name: Process Baselining: Process Started with System User Privileges
notes: Enable this rule to create a baseline of processes executed with System user privileges found in your environment.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
when the event matches Username IMATCHES 'NT\sAUTHORITY\\SYSTEM' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Process Baselining: Process Started with System User Privileges on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
AND when the event matches Username IMATCHES 'NT\sAUTHORITY\\SYSTEM' AQL filter query
RED_list: Add the "File Hash" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "ProcessHashesStartedAsSystemUser"
